channel.title: Welcome to the Internet
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Internet topics are a primary interest, but as internet denizens we welcome our panel, guests, and listeners/viewers to bring their own topics for discussion.
channel.itunes:author: Orphic Enterprises
channel.itunes:summary: Internet topics like Linux servers, graphic design, SEO, and DevOps are a primary interest, but as internet denizens we welcome our panel, guests, and listeners/viewers to bring their own topics for discussion.

item.title: Pilot
item.itunes:author: Orphic Enterprises
item.itunes:subtitle: Introduction to the podcast, our panel, and some of the latest tech news.
item.itunes:summary:
Show Notes:
06:30 - Technology in Elections
Related Links: https://media.ccc.de/v/31c3_-_6344_-_en_-_saal_1_-_201412281400_-_security_analysis_of_estonia_s_internet_voting_system_-_j_alex_halderman https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w3_0x6oaDmI https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vermin_Supreme
17:10 - Halloween Spoils Related Links: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0110978/ https://www.kvue.com/article/news/local/texas/dine-inside-the-original-home-featured-in-texas-chainsaw-massacre-in-kingsland/269-cbf1671e-6be7-484e-a00e-c707a1568d91 https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0077651
24:35 - Guest Panel
SelfHostPro's Yacht project: https://github.com/SelfhostedPro/Yacht
25:05 - Cyberpunk 2077 Delay/Software release delays https://www.theverge.com/2020/10/27/21536662/cyberpunk-2077-cd-projekt-red-delay-december
38:12 - What Operating Systems do you run?
https://apple.com/macos https://microsoft.com/windows https://ubuntu.com
50:20 - TIG/ELK Stack Explanation
51:48 - Rural Broadband discussion
Related Links: https://berniesanders.com/issues/high-speed-internet-all/
59:58 - What is SelfHostedPro/Yacht?
1:02:00 - "Bruh" Games
1:04:00 - iPhone 12 Camera can't be replaced aftermarket
https://www.ifixit.com/News/45921/is-this-the-end-of-the-repairable-iphone
Music by Mantra Love: https://mantralove.com - Learn more about "Welcome to the Internet" at https://orphic.enterprises/welcome-to-the-internet

item.title: Ecommerce
item.itunes:author: Orphic Enterprises
item.itunes:subtitle: Discussion of Ecommerce related topics.
item.itunes:summary:
Show Notes:
Guests: Seve: https://seve.blog/ Topher: https://topher1kenobe.com/
01:51 - Seve's SevCoin 12:50 - Thoughts on Amazon 19:30 - Neopets 23:00 - CBD vs. THC 31:15 - Political influence in businesses 40:00 - What was your first online purchase? 55:00 - Do you use Google Play Store or iTunes for media? 01:05:45 - Telnet experiences 01:09:30 - Topher's recommendation for WordPress themes 01:13:00 - Topher's "Must-Have" WordPress plugins https://wp-rocket.me/ https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-super-cache/ https://wordpress.org/plugins/public-post-preview/ https://wordpress.org/plugins/press-permit-core/ 01:19:20 - Topher's WordPress hosting recommendations https://dreamhost.com/ https://convesio.com/ https://wpengine.com/
